purpose: Record the focused Defense & Avoidance sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.engineReuse: Use existing attack-option, reaction, and damage-threshold seams. Do not create a parallel defense engine.
policy.staticVsConditional: Static bonuses and damage-threshold rules are normalized as concrete metadata. Situational feats remain advisory until the combat workflow supplies exact context.
policy.alreadyCovered: Flurry and Melee Defense are already handled by core attack-option hooks. Combat Reflexes is already handled by core combat reaction hooks.

implementedEntries.name: Improved Damage Threshold
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to resourceRules.damageThreshold FLAT_BONUS +5 for MetaResourceFeatResolver damage-threshold consumers.

implementedEntries.name: Fight Through Pain
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to resourceRules.damageThreshold USE_WILL_AS_BASE with useBest=true.

implementedEntries.name: Tumble Defense
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores tumble/movement defense metadata. Requires movement/AoO workflow context before application.

implementedEntries.name: Predictive Defense
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores predictive/conditional defense metadata. Requires chosen/incoming attack context before application.

implementedEntries.name: Moving Target
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores movement-dependent Reflex defense metadata. Requires proof of movement in workflow context.

implementedEntries.name: Trench Warrior
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores cover/entrenched-position defense metadata. Exact cover state remains workflow/GM adjudicated.

implementedEntries.name: Cunning Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores target-vulnerability attack metadata. Actual attack modifier belongs to attack workflow once target state is known.

implementedEntries.name: Resilient Strength
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores condition/strength resilience metadata. Exact modifier waits for condition workflow context.

implementedEntries.name: Wary Defender
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores defensive awareness/surprise-context metadata. Exact application waits for workflow context.
